commit_message: got a physical unit, starting bringup tests

user_prompt: every 30 seconds, chunk_samples doubles, the test ends when chunk_samples is at max_capacity_samples for 30 seconds. Have a print when the switch occurs so we can see which section of log is what chunk_size.
the report should also include the `writeDurationAverageMs` and `writeDurationMaxMs`, and call `resetWriteDurationStats`.
agent_reply: - Stops after the max chunk size has run for 30 seconds.
- Prints a `throughput section` line whenever the chunk size changes.
- Calls `AudioFileRecorder::resetWriteDurationStats()` after each report and at each section switch.
I used the shared FIFO capacity as the max: `min(bt_capacity_samples, mic_capacity_samples)`, so one chunk can fit in either FIFO.
